# Site Runbook Update

Use this skill whenever a turn verified a durable fact about the target site.

## Update Targets

- `Verified Steps`
- `Stable Locator Hints`
- `Known Branches`
- `Current Resume Point`
- `Open Questions / Human Input Needed`

## Rules

- Record only verified facts or clearly labeled open questions.
- Keep the resume point aligned with the latest `run-state.json`.
- If escalation is needed, make the unresolved step explicit.
